calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-24-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frank Yuen for Garrett Jeung

The Court had question regarding appropriateness of request for extraordinary fees. Mr. Yuen stated this was a difficult case since there are 13 beneficiaries, the decedent was a hoarder, and problematic communication with beneficiary who lives on an island. The Administrator needed to check that the property is structurally sound, remove mold and trash. Furthermore, Mr. Yuen stated no one has objected to the accounting and request for fees as filed. The First and Final Report of Administrator and Petition for its Settlement on Waiver of Account, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone/Shirley Le. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung. (Not reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Continued To Feb-20-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (218 Gambier Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134-1340)
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Frank Yuen for Garrett Jeung (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $860,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed September 22, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $417,000.00 is required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
